reasoning: This sequence simulates the action of announcing something loudly using a loudspeaker. The robot will raise both arms to shoulder height with hands cupped, as if holding a loudspeaker, then move them slightly outward to emphasize the announcement. The animation will feature a slight delay before the arms move outwards, creating a sense of anticipation. The final frame will show the robot's arms returning to a neutral, relaxed position. The use of both arms helps to portray the expansive nature of a loud announcement.  The frames are designed to highlight the key moments of the action, rather than providing smooth transitions which are handled by the animation system.
